speaker: MATT
raw_text: -- because that's what a bear does. And so the giant open palm of the automaton gets slammed by the strength of Trinket's claw and this is going to be the, one way or another, the fastest arm wrestling match you've ever seen. I need you to go ahead and roll a d20 and add Trinket's strength modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What? You swing back?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I said I'd take the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He said he wants the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Bullshit. All right, we take the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, Doty hasn't voted yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Neither has Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What, is Doty the center that breaks the tie?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe they should arm wrestle for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe they should.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Giant grizzly bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Arm wrestle that bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Turns towards you and Trinket goes-- (bear grunting)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket's arms don't bend that way. Trinket, you can do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Saunters up and looks up at Doty-- (bear sniffing, snorts) Fogs up the metal for a second on the outside--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I haven't chosen my dice yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Choose your dice. (chuckles)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (snorts) Give her 35 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just hold on, I just need like a few--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just pick one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She needs a bucket of Vaseline, a feather, preferably from a dove, and 35-40 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Why's all my stuff in different order?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so the-- it takes roughly five or so minutes to try and bring one of the nearby tables over without burning the shit out of your palms--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- that could possibly facilitate an arm wrestling match between a giant metal man and a grizzly bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh-- but, wait wait wait wait. Doty's not going to get any advantage on this because he's been leaning against a door, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's cooled off by now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, as it's all there, the giant metal man, Trinket comes up--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Where's my Doty stats--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Put your whole body into it, Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Trinket, not really-- Trinket doesn't grasp, Trinket just goes-- and just does like a claw strike at his, at his hand--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so, this going to be a surprise-- Not a surprise round, it knows you guys are there, but this-- this is going to be a roll for initiative. Everyone, roll some initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, are you an alchemist?

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: It wasn't my chemistry set.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you hear a (click) sound and a door beginning to open on the north end of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, hide! Hide under the table!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I fall flat on the floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I go still as a statue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make stealth checks, Taryon and Grog with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we still have Pass Without a Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we still have Pass Without a Trace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 19 for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A 19 and a 20. A natural 19 and a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With disadvantage, you got a 19? Holy shit! Oh, plus-- yeah, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Am I joining in here? Or can I just get back on the table?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get on the table if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: All right, so I get back on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, but you do it noisily.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I flop down on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So the door opens, and as it does--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, oh god. Ah! Oh my god, oh my god, oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a map, it's a map!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A creature comes through, similar to Ipkesh, another humanoid, this one a little thicker, burlier, with a medium-grey hair that is kind of a tangled mass all into dreads right past the shoulders. Big, leathery red wings, red skin, horns at the front, and has a big sword it kind of is pulling out of a sheath on the side of it as it comes in, looking around the room. Which-- Immediately kind of steps into the chamber, as you guys all hide off to the side. "Shit!" And is going to turn around and just go running in the opposite direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! I shoot an arrow in the back of his neck.
